julesThoughtProcess: I selected a vibrant cyber-teal (#00E5FF) to reflect the grounded optimism of this technofuturistic slice of life. It evokes a sense of clarity, forward momentum, and the cool glow of ubiquitous neon, without feeling overly sterile or aggressive. It perfectly complements the bold, punchy 1-bit aesthetics of the portrait.
storyPanel: Even in the dense, towering hab-blocks of Sector 4, you can find quiet moments of connection. The old automatons still serve synth-caf on the corner, their hydraulic joints humming a familiar tune. We may be a mix of flesh, chrome, and code, but we still gather under the neon to share stories of the day. The rain washes the streets, but tomorrow always brings a new hustle, a new spark of life.
